text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's fall, and both Agnes Digital and King Halo
have started gearing up for the Mile
Championship. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! King Halo has finished seventh! She
had us on our toes for a second, but it appears
she's still got a long ways to go before she's back
in top shape!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, wheeze... Ngh! Why is this happening...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, King...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still on her road to recovery. After the
audience leaves the racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hey, King...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Digital? You came to watch me? Thanks, but
please just leave me be.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...But I can't really say that to you, can I? Very
well, I grant you the right to join me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O-okay. So, ummm... About the race today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You might not have won, but you were still
amazing. I'm just awestruck by your ability—it hits
me every time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your last spurt down the final stretch, the
elegance in your running form, and the beautiful
way you handle the turns...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All I could think was, "This is first-rate! King is the
most first-rate of all first-rates!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And so... Well...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is that the only reason you thought I was
first-rate?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uh, no! Nonononono! There's more! Like your flowing hair! And the loud, proud way you laugh! And your stylish signature racewear. And that caboose—ooh, whoopsie.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That's quite a list... Still, all of those things are trivial.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's something far more important when it
comes to being first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
At any rate. You've come all the way here, so why
don't you have a run with me around the track?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A serious run, of course. No one else is around, so
we can really let ourselves go.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: S-sure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two get permission to use the track and begin
their private scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, wheeze... Hoo...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo loses the scrimmage without much
fanfare. Already exhausted from today's race, she
doesn't push herself beyond her limit.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehehehe... Pathetic, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What do you think now, Digital? Was I beautiful
and elegant like before, or am I just a tired,
worn-out Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How can I be first-rate when there's not a
modicum of first-rate left in me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um... Th-that's...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Here I am, effortlessly outstripped by even a
classic-year runner. I'm just a weak and tired
loser.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But even if I'm but a mere shadow of my past
self...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dusk quietly creeps in.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There's still tomorrow, isn't there?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll lose again... but there's yet another
tomorrow to come.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What if I choose to simply not give up? What if I
choose to keep running and keep losing until I
win? What then?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look at me, Digital. Tell me the truth. Is there
really anything first-rate left about me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Th-there...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There is! You still have it! You're as unwavering as
the light of the Flying Dutchman!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The Flying what? ...What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I mean...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm talking about your unflagging tenacity. How
you never sink, no matter how many licks you
take.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's true. No one can take away my persistence.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter how many times I lose, or how
many times I'm laughed at or ridiculed.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've told everyone that I'm first-rate. That's why,
even if I fall and eat dust more than anyone else,
I've always changed myself and stood back up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No matter how far I fall, I will never give up hope!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That is what makes me first-rate—now and
forever!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... King!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when she's beaten and battered, King Halo's
beauty doesn't fade.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Do you get it, Digital? Do you understand what makes me me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I hear you, King. I've taken your words to
heart.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Have you? Then, do you understand what it
means for Umamusume to run?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Yes... We can't feel inferior. There's no time
for that when we run!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's correct. Whether you've gotten a late start
or stumbled to the ground, there's nothing you
can't recover from!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why I will recover my form before the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Feeling bad for me... Or holding back when you
run against me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Those things are an insult to me as a first-rate
Umamusume. And to your own abilities as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Right... That's right... I... had it all wrong.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've taught me a fragment of what it means to
be first-rate... and I'll hold it close to my heart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best to train for the Mile Championship!
I'll make you proud!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know that I shouldn't be fangirling super hard
when I'm supposed to be in serious training mode,
but... I've gotta say it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You are every bit as divine as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital brings her hands together as if to
offer a prayer. It's a gesture that seems a bit
silly... yet it communicates her unwavering
respect.
